cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value.
cards.title: Ambush

cards.immediateText:
If you are MOUNTED, the value of the opponents defense is 0 and cannot be changed by card effects.
(Other card effects still happen.)
cards.title: Phantasmal Strike

cards.afterText:
If you won the combat, the opponents move is 0 next turn.
(They may still BOOST for movement.)
cards.title: Haunting Visage

cards.afterText: The opposing fighter may move up to 5 spaces.
cards.title: Ichabod's Demise

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: Dash

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If your fighter started this turn in a different space, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Ghastly Trample

cards.duringText: If the Headless Horsemen is not MOUNTED, then the value of this card is 6 instead.
cards.title: Restless Revenant

cards.afterText: The damage that the fighter would have taken is halved (rounded up).
cards.title: Veteran's Intuition

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, move the Horse up to 4 spaces. You may through opposing fighters.
cards.title: Expeditious Retreat

cards.basicText:
Choose two effects:
- Draw 2 cards.
- Headless Horseman recovers 3 health.
- Place your fighters in any space.
cards.title: Legend of Sleepy Hollow

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent. If their fighter is adjacent to the Headless Horseman, they must discard the top or bottom card in their deck.
cards.title: Hessian of the Hollow

cards.basicText: Choose either the Headless Horseman or the Horse. All of the chosen fighter's defense cards are +2 value, until the start of your next turn.
cards.title: Spectral fortitude

cards.basicText:
Reveal the top card of your deck. 
Move your fighters equal to its BOOST value. If they are MOUNTED double the BOOST value and deal 2 damage to an adjacent fighter. Put the card in your hand.
cards.title: Unearthly Equestrian

hero.name: Headless Horseman
hero.specialAbility:
HEADLESS RIDER
The Headless Horseman is a MOUNTED fighter. 

While MOUNTED, the Headless Horseman and Horse have a MOVE of 4 instead.

name: Headless Horseman
note:
MOUNTED FIGHTER RULES: A fighter may become MOUNTED or dismount as part of a maneuver action, but not as part of other movement effects.  At any point in the maneuver action, you may spend 1 space of movement to become MOUNTED or dismount for free. When your fighters become MOUNTED place your hero on the sidekick (mount); when dismounting place your hero in an unoccupied space adjacent to your sidekick (mount). If all spaces are occupied you cannot dismount and your fighters remain MOUNTED.

While MOUNTED, your fighters occupy the same space and have a move of 4 instead. You may choose either fighter when attacking or defending. When resolving other movement effects move both fighters to the new space. Noncombat damage dealt by schemes is decided by the opponent.

CREATOR NOTES:
For the mini, if I were to design it, the Headless Horseman would have a divot underneath the mini where the horse sidekick token could clip in. I've been working on/reworking this concept for two years and would love to see Restoration Games make the Horseman a fighter. Imaging the art is always fun and I am a sucker for villainous/monster fighters in our battle of legends.
